theme_archetype.archetype: 1 (Organic & Earthy) blended with 5 (Jewel & Luxury) for contrast
theme_archetype.theme: hybrid (Light earthy content sections with Dark premium structural elements like Header/Footer/Hero)
theme_archetype.description: A premium, 'Farm-to-Kitchen' brand identity blending the traditional village tribal motifs (Nimadi Pithora art) with a clean, modern corporate aesthetic. Earthy base with deep red/maroon contrast.

headings.usage: Hero typography, section titles, product titles. Use tighter letter-spacing.

body.usage: Paragraphs, UI elements, labels, small text. Use geometric readability.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_philosophy: Generous spacing. Use p-8, p-12, p-20 for sections to give breathing room. Borders with padding inside.
layout_and_spacing.borders: Use subtle 1px borders colored with earthy_brown/10 for structural elements, and Pithora-inspired SVG decorative borders for section transitions.
layout_and_spacing.radius: rounded-none or rounded-sm to maintain a premium corporate feel. Avoid heavy rounded corners.

buttons.primary: bg-chilli_red text-parchment hover:bg-deep_maroon transition-colors duration-300 font-medium px-8 py-3 rounded-none
buttons.secondary: bg-turmeric_yellow text-rich_black hover:bg-yellow-500 transition-colors duration-300 font-medium px-8 py-3 rounded-none
buttons.outline: border-2 border-chilli_red text-chilli_red hover:bg-chilli_red hover:text-parchment transition-colors duration-300 px-8 py-3 rounded-none

cards.product: bg-white border border-earthy_brown/10 hover:shadow-xl transition-shadow duration-300 p-0 overflow-hidden
cards.partnership: bg-parchment border border-chilli_red/20 p-8 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:border-chilli_red transition-all duration-300 group

navigation.header: Sticky header. Dark theme (bg-rich_black) to beautifully support the provided logo. Text in parchment. Floating with subtle border-b border-white/10.
navigation.footer: Dark theme (bg-rich_black) with deep_maroon subtle gradients. Huge footer layout with logo and Pithora art footer border.

motion.page_load: Framer motion staggered fade-ins for typography.
motion.scroll: Parallax effect on the Journey Illustration.

icons.library: lucide-react for standard UI, supplemented with custom SVG paths for village/tribal motifs (mountain triangles, dot patterns).

global.navbar: Dark background to support logo. Nav links in white/parchment. Inquiry cart icon with item count badge.
global.footer: Dark maroon background. Multi-column: Quick Links, Contact Info, Socials. Pithora border separating footer from main content.
global.whatsapp_floating: Fixed bottom-right button for WhatsApp (+916265996333), using turmeric_yellow or whatsapp green.

home.hero: Split layout or bento grid. Headline: 'The Soul of Nimad, The Spirit of Purity.' Dark maroon background with 'spice_flatlay' image. Call to Action: 'Explore Products'.
home.story_section: Light parchment background. Displays the provided 'journey_illustration' prominently. Text detailing the 5-step journey.
home.featured_products: Grid showcasing top categories: Standard Pouch vs Premium Box.

about.legacy: Highlight founder Mukesh Kushwah. Timeline or narrative from 'Mukesh & Sons Masala Udhyog' to 'Pvt Ltd'.
about.visuals: Use the 'agriculture' stock photo. Pithora motifs styling.

product_catalog.layout: Filter sidebar (Standard vs Premium). Grid of product cards.
product_catalog.product_card: Image, Title (Turmeric, Chilli, Meat Masala, etc.), Variants (20g, 50g, 100g), 'Inquire / Add to Cart' button.
product_catalog.cart_behavior: Adds to inquiry context state, opens slide-out cart panel. No real payments, just a 'Submit Inquiry' form at checkout.

csr.content: Focus on Nimad farmers, tribal communities, eco-friendly Rajpur plant. Earthy, photo-heavy layout.

join_us.layout: 4 large bento-style cards: Suppliers, Careers, Distributors, Influencers.
join_us.interaction: Clicking a card opens a Shadcn Dialog containing a role-specific inquiry form.

contact.layout: Split section: Rajpur factory address vs Indore Scheme 51 marketing office. Form with 'info@nimadzayka.com'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Tailwind CSS for styling and Shadcn/UI primitives for complex components (Dialog for inquiries, Sheet for the inquiry cart).
Initialize standard React app with `.js` files (NO `.tsx`).
All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, dialog triggers, cart actions) MUST include `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid='add-to-cart-btn'`, `data-testid='inquiry-submit'`).
Typography: Use `Fraunces` (Headings) and `Manrope` (Body) from Google Fonts.

For the custom Pithora/Warli borders, use CSS background-image repeating with the `pithora_border` asset, or create abstract inline SVG patterns (triangles, dots) using the `chilli_red` or `turmeric_yellow` colors.
The inquiry cart should be a React context that holds items and weight variants, ending in a contact form submission instead of Stripe/payment gateway.

Logo handling: Because the logo has a black background, it is strictly recommended to keep the Navbar and Footer background `rich_black` (#120F0E) or `deep_maroon`. If the logo must be placed on a light section, render it inside a dark card wrapper.
